response: Rewrite a business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL. In 2002, [Agent Name] & The Vintage Team at Compass was established by [Agent Name] as an organization offering real estate agency expertise for both sellers and buyers in commercial and residential properties. The company serves homeowners and business owners as a trusted advisor for all aspects of real estate and financing, with a goal of maintaining lifelong client relationships. [Agent Name] and the team serve the following locations: Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, the Lake Nona Region, and Lancaster Park—collectively known as Central Florida—and are operated by a small team of real estate experts.
